What We Offer

Managed services for
enterprise infrastructure

Comprehensive IT infrastructure and cloud managed services designed to ensure performance, security, and scalability for modern enterprises.

Stable, optimized, enterprise-grade

Managed IT Infrastructure

Management of enterprise servers, operating systems, storage systems, and virtualization environments to ensure stable and optimized operations.

Request Service →
Includes
  • Server lifecycle management and monitoring
  • OS patching, updates, and configuration management
  • Storage system administration and capacity planning
  • VMware vSphere and Hyper-V virtualization management
  • Performance tuning and proactive incident resolution
  • Infrastructure health dashboards and monthly reporting
Optimize spend. Maximize performance.

Cloud Infrastructure Management

Management and optimization of cloud platforms including deployment, monitoring, and cost management across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

Request Service →
Includes
  • Cloud environment deployment and configuration
  • Cost optimization and FinOps advisory
  • Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Bicep, CloudFormation)
  • Cloud security posture management
  • Performance monitoring and auto-scaling configuration
  • Multi-cloud governance and policy enforcement
Always on. Always visible.

Network Monitoring & Management

Monitoring and management of enterprise network infrastructure including routers, switches, firewalls, and SD-WAN environments.

Request Service →
Includes
  • 24/7 network monitoring and alerting
  • Firewall configuration and policy management
  • Routing protocol administration (BGP, OSPF)
  • VLAN and network segmentation management
  • SD-WAN deployment and optimization
  • Network performance reporting and capacity planning
Protect, detect, respond.

Cybersecurity Management

Protection of systems, networks, and data through continuous security monitoring, vulnerability management, and incident response.

Request Service →
Includes
  • Security information and event management (SIEM)
  • Vulnerability scanning and remediation management
  • Endpoint detection and response (EDR) administration
  • Security policy development and compliance
  • Incident response planning and execution
  • Security awareness and hardening reviews
When things go wrong, you're ready.

Backup & Disaster Recovery

Data protection and disaster recovery planning to ensure business continuity and rapid restoration after incidents.

Request Service →
Includes
  • Backup solution design, deployment, and management
  • Recovery time objective (RTO) and RPO definition
  • DR site configuration and replication management
  • Regular backup integrity testing and validation
  • Disaster recovery runbook development
  • Cloud-based DR with Zerto, Veeam, or Azure Site Recovery
Expert help when you need it.

IT Support Services

Technical assistance and troubleshooting support for enterprise systems, infrastructure, and end users.

Request Service →
Includes
  • Level 2 and Level 3 infrastructure support
  • Escalation support for complex technical issues
  • On-demand specialist access (cloud, vmware, networking)
  • Root cause analysis and post-incident reports
  • Knowledge base and runbook documentation
  • Flexible SLA options (business hours or 24/7)
Flexible Engagements

Infrastructure Advisory Retainers

Not ready for a full managed service? Nuvextro also offers advisory retainers — ongoing technical guidance from a certified infrastructure architect.

Discuss a Retainer →
